message:
feat: Pattern 3 monorepo escape stub generation for sibling imports (bd-k5q5.8.4)

When a relative import (../../shared) escapes all known extension roots
and repair mode is AutoStrict, generate an in-memory virtual stub module
with heuristic-shaped exports (is*/has*→false, get*→{}, ALL_CAPS→[],
UpperCase→class). Includes import name extraction via regex for both ESM
and CJS patterns. 17 unit tests + 2 integration tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
